Summary:
Summary:
My name is Dario Rodriguez, I was born on 08/12/2001. My training in computer science began in high school, where I developed technical skills in computing, solving hardware and software problems, installing and configuring operating systems, also laying a solid foundation in programming logic and databases.
In 2023 I took the Higher Technician in Systems Analysis at the Santo Tomas de Aquino University, where I learned to integrate complete web environments of backend and frontend, implement libraries and APIs, and plan projects with entity-relationship diagrams, flow and Gantt. I developed a web platform as a thesis project, applying knowledge in design, implementation and deployment. I feel prepared and actively looking for an environment where I can professionalize myself, either as technical support or developer.
